# defectdojo_product_type_member (Resource)

DefectDojo Product Type Member

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "defectdojo_product_type_member" "example" {
  product_type = 1
  user         = 1
  role         = 2
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `product_type` (Number) The ID of the Product Type
- `role` (Number) The role ID for this product type membership
- `user` (Number) The ID of the User

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Identifier

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import defectdojo_product_type_member.example 123
```
